data.title: Coinbase, Shopify to Simplify Real-World Crypto Payments: Best Wallet to Join the Fray with Fiat Card
data.description:
Crypto exchange Coinbase announced that it will launch its Coinbase One Card later this fall. To be offered in partnership with American Express, the card will provide up to 4% Bitcoin cashback, and zero trading fees (with a spread for the first $500 traded per month), among other goodies. According to the Coinbase One Card website, you can sign up for early access, and you’ll be notified when they start receiving applications. There are also no foreign transaction fees, and you can repay your balance using your linked bank account or crypto on Coinbase
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/coinbase-shopify-best-wallet-fiat-card-payments/

data.title: Walmart and Amazon Explore Stablecoin Development Amid Regulatory Progress
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Walmart and Amazon are reportedly considering the issuance of their own US dollar-backed stablecoins, marking a potential shift towards broader institutional adoption of stablecoins in the United States. This move comes as regulatory clarity around digital currencies continues to improve, paving the way for major corporations to explore innovative payment solutions.

The Wall Street Journal reported that the two retail giants are contemplating the creation of brand-specific stablecoins, although neither company has officially confirmed these plans. If implemented, a stablecoin payment system could significantly alter the financial landscape by redirecting billions in cash flow away from traditional banking partners. Amazon, for instance, reported an impressive $638 billion in annual revenue for 2024, with global e-commerce sales reaching approximately $447 billion, according to Statista data. Similarly, Walmart's global e-commerce sales exceeded $100 billion in 2023, accounting for 17.8% of its total annual sales, as reported in August 2024.

The adoption of stablecoin-based payment systems could offer substantial benefits, including faster and cheaper transactions, potentially saving these large corporations billions in banking fees. This development aligns with the broader trend of digital currency integration within the e-commerce sector. Notably, Shopify, another global e-commerce leader, has already announced plans to integrate USDC payments for its users by the end of 2025, as reported by Cointelegraph on June 13.

As this story continues to unfold, further updates will be provided as more information becomes available. The potential for Walmart and Amazon to issue stablecoins represents a significant step in the evolution of digital payments, highlighting the growing interest among major corporations in leveraging blockchain technology to enhance their financial operations.

data.title: Whale Trader Profits from Bitcoin Short Position
data.description: According to Odaily, a whale trader known as 'kyoyo' has achieved a floating profit of $5.17 million from a short position in Bitcoin. Utilizing a 40x leverage, the trader has shorted 1,268 BTC, with the position valued at $132 million.

data.title: Israel Launches New Attack on Iran's Natanz Nuclear Facility
data.description: According to Foresight News, Israel has conducted another strike on Iran's Natanz nuclear facility, as reported by Israel's national television. This development marks a continuation of tensions between the two nations over nuclear capabilities and regional security concerns.

data.title: Dollar Strengthens Following Geopolitical Tensions in Middle East
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, analysts from Monex Europe have reported that the U.S. dollar has strengthened following an attack by Israel on Iranian nuclear facilities. This development serves as a reminder to those who doubted the dollar's status as a safe-haven currency.

The analysts noted that while unstable U.S. policies have diminished the dollar's appeal as a refuge, significant geopolitical shocks continue to favor the currency. They emphasized that the U.S. economy is relatively less affected by such disruptions compared to other safe havens. The balance between tariff concerns and geopolitical tensions is expected to be the primary market driver at present.

data.title: BSC Foundation purchased another 6.49 million VIXBT, and the token rose by 62% in a short period of time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the BSC Foundation address spent $25,000 to purchase 6.49 million VIXBT (unit price $0.0052043) two minutes ago. This is the foundation's second increase in holdings after half a month, directly pushing the market value of VIXBT to exceed $5 million, and the price rose by 62% in a short period of time.

data.title: A whale spent 10 million USDT to buy WBTC at the bottom, making a profit of 31,700 USD in three hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the whale purchased 95.84 WBTC (about 10 million USDT) at an average price of $104,329 three hours ago. With the current price of WBTC rising to $104,635.85, the investment has realized a floating profit of $31,700.

data.title: Tencent has not considered acquiring Nexon, the developer of DNF and MapleStory
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a source close to Tencent, "Tencent has not contacted the founder's family to discuss a deal, nor has it considered acquiring Nexon." Earlier media reports said that Tencent is studying the acquisition of South Korean game developer Nexon at a valuation of US$15 billion (equivalent to RMB 107.7 billion) and has contacted the founder's family. (Beike Finance) 
Previously, Bloomberg reported that Tencent plans to acquire Nexon, the developer of "DNF" and "MapleStory".

data.title: NXPC fell to 1.355 USDT, a short-term drop of more than 7%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Perhaps affected by the news that Tencent has not considered acquiring Nexon, OKX market data shows that NXPC fell to 1.355 USDT, a short-term drop of more than 7%, and is currently quoted at 1.361 USDT.

data.title: Trump: Israel will take more actions and the situation will only get worse
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump: Israel will take more actions, and the situation will only get worse. I have given Iran many opportunities to make a deal, but they failed to complete the task. We still have time to end this conflict. Iran must reach an agreement, otherwise it will be nothing. Be sure to act now, so as not to be too late. (Jinshi)

data.title: Polygon Has a New Plan: Is It Too Late for POL?
data.description:
Polygon plans to pivot, focusing on the PoS and AggLayer with leadership from CEO Sandeep Nailwal. POL has been dragging lower as Ethereum layer-2 solutions like Base and Arbitrum increase in TVL. Ethereum is inherently less scalable, making it impossible to run a Facebook-like dApp without users incurring thousands in fees and congesting the network.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/altcoins/polygon-has-a-new-plan-is-it-too-late-for-pol/

data.title: US media: Israel revealed that the action against Iraq "clearly received the green light from the United States"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the AXIOS website, Israel's attack on Iran can be said to be the largest single blow to the Iranian regime since the Islamic Revolution in 1979, which may involve the United States and destroy any hope of reaching a nuclear agreement. Although Trump himself has repeatedly stated that he opposes Israeli attacks that may "blow up" negotiations. But in the hours after the attack began, Israeli officials revealed that all this was coordinated with Washington. Trump and his aides only pretended to oppose Israel's attacks in public, and did not express opposition in private. An Israeli official claimed: "We clearly got the green light from the United States." They said the goal was to convince Iran that there was no imminent attack and to ensure that Iranians on Israel's target list would not move to new locations. Even Netanyahu's aides revealed that Trump tried to prevent Israel from launching an attack in a phone call on Monday, but in fact the call was about coordination before the attack. The United States has not confirmed any of these claims. (Jin Shi)

data.title: AFP: Iran defines Israel's attack as a "declaration of war"
data.description: According to AFP: Iran defines the Israeli attack as a "declaration of war." (Jinshi)

data.title: Walmart and Amazon are planning to issue their own stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Walmart and Amazon are exploring issuing their own stablecoins in the US market, or using them for payment and settlement in their own merchant ecosystems. According to sources, this move can transfer a large amount of cash and card transactions out of the traditional financial system, reduce billions of dollars in fees, and speed up payments. (Wall Street Journal)

data.title: SharpLink shares tumble 70% after $425M raise for Ethereum treasury strategy
data.description:
SharpLink's shares fell over 70% after the company's recent filing notifying a potential resale of over 68 million common shares.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/358045/sharplink-shares-tumble-70-after-425m-raise-for-ethereum-treasury-strategy?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
